credentials.name: MS Graph OAuth2
credentials.notes: Azure AD app registration for MS Graph calendar and email access. Requires admin consent for the listed scopes.

credentials.name: Pulse API Token
credentials.notes: Pulse API bearer token. Value format: 'Bearer <token>'. Set pulseApiBaseUrl in n8n environment variables.

credentials.name: Ollama Base URL
credentials.notes: Default: http://localhost:11434 — Ollama must be running locally. All AI inference uses this endpoint. Never route sensitive data to external AI APIs.

credentials.name: MS Teams Webhook URL
credentials.notes: MS Teams incoming webhook URL for urgent grievance deadline alerts. Only plain-text alerts are sent — no sensitive case details.

setup_notes.pulse_api_base_url: Set to your Pulse app base URL, e.g., http://localhost:8000. Referenced as $credentials.pulseApiBaseUrl in workflows.
setup_notes.ollama_base_url: Set to your Ollama instance URL, e.g., http://localhost:11434. Referenced as $credentials.ollamaBaseUrl in workflows.
setup_notes.ms_teams_webhook_url: Set to your MS Teams incoming webhook URL. Referenced as $credentials.msTeamsWebhookUrl in workflows.
setup_notes.security_reminder: NEVER commit actual credential values. This template contains empty strings only. Configure credentials directly in the n8n UI.
setup_notes.n8n_webhook_secret: A strong random secret (e.g., openssl rand -hex 32). Callers must send this as the X-Webhook-Secret header on all webhook POST requests. Referenced as $env.N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET in webhook validation code nodes.
